overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing three distinct environments in Night City: a coastal elevated walkway at dusk with heavy traffic below, a bright waterfront shanty town with makeshift structures, and a highway engulfed in an orange dust storm. The video demonstrates the game's detailed urban environments, neon-lit architecture, and dynamic weather systems.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal walkway overlooking multi-lane highway

events.description: beginning walk along elevated coastal walkway at sunset with palm trees
turning right to follow the curved path of the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated coastal walkway, observing traffic below and city skyline

entered.detail: prominent yellow-orange concrete railing and wall structures lining the walkway
tall palm trees silhouetted against the sunset sky
large building with circular digital screen displaying advertisements
busy multi-lane highway with heavy traffic flowing below the walkway
distant futuristic city buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated coastal walkway at golden hour, with warm sunset lighting silhouetting palm trees against a purple-orange sky. The camera walks forward along yellow concrete barriers, overlooking a busy highway with dense traffic. A distinctive building with a large circular billboard dominates the right side as the path curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront shanty town with makeshift dock structures

events.description: abrupt scene change to waterfront shanty town in bright daylight
passing alongside red houseboat moored in the water canal

agents.ego_description: walking through waterfront shanty settlement, passing NPCs on the dock walkway

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking along the waterfront path toward the camera

entered.detail: makeshift shanty structures with rusted corrugated metal roofing
murky water canal running alongside the walkway
towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and holograms
red and green floating structure moored in the canal
elevated transit bridge spanning across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to a bright daytime waterfront shanty town, with the camera walking along a wooden dock past corrugated metal shacks. A red houseboat sits in the murky canal while towering neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the background skyline. Two pedestrians walk toward the camera along the narrow path.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway sidewalk during heavy dust storm

events.description: scene cuts to highway environment engulfed in thick orange fog
heavy dust storm reduces visibility to near zero with orange atmospheric haze
continuing walk along highway barrier, passing digital billboards barely visible through fog

agents.ego_description: walking along highway sidewalk through dense orange fog, visibility severely limited

notable_agents.action: silhouetted pedestrian walking through the dense fog on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure looming through the fog
large digital advertisement screens barely visible through orange haze
tall modern street lamps lining the highway
palm fronds and tropical vegetation visible in foreground
concrete and metal barrier separating sidewalk from highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a highway during a severe dust storm, with thick orange fog obscuring the sky and reducing visibility. The camera walks along a sidewalk next to a busy highway, passing under massive overpass structures and digital billboards that glow faintly through the haze. Sparse pedestrians navigate the sidewalk while vehicles move cautiously through the dense atmospheric conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene coastal sunset into a bright waterfront slum and finally into a suffocating urban dust storm. It begins on an elevated walkway at golden hour, moving past yellow concrete barriers and silhouetted palm trees while overlooking a dense highway under a purple-orange sky. As the lighting shifts to bright daylight, the scene opens into a waterfront shanty town where the camera walks along wooden docks past corrugated metal shacks and a red houseboat, with neon skyscrapers looming in the distance. The environment then transforms into a severe dust storm, shifting the palette to a thick, oppressive orange haze that obscures the sky. Finally, the camera navigates a sidewalk beneath massive overpass structures and glowing digital billboards as vehicles move cautiously through the dense atmospheric fog.
